Name: GitHub - Create Repository
Description: This step creates a new GitHub repository if it does not exist.

Parameters.Name: CreateGithubRepo.Git.Url.NewRepoName
Parameters.Label: Repository Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the new GitHub repository.

Parameters.Name: CreateGithubRepo.Git.Url.NewRepoNamePrefix
Parameters.Label: Repository Name Prefix
Parameters.HelpText:
An optional prefix to apply to the name of the new repository. The repository name will often be generated from the project name, and the prefix will be based on a tenant name (`#{Octopus.Deployment.Tenant.Name}`) to ensure each tenant has a unique repo.


This value can be left blank.

Parameters.Name: CreateGithubRepo.Git.Url.Organization
Parameters.Label: GitHub Owner or Organization
Parameters.HelpText: This is the GitHub owner or organisation where the new repo is created.

Parameters.Name: CreateGithubRepo.Git.Credentials.AccessToken
Parameters.Label: GitHub Access Token
Parameters.HelpText: The access token used to authenticate with GitHub. See the [GitHub documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/keeping-your-account-and-data-secure/managing-your-personal-access-tokens) for more details.
